_comment: Hand-maintained patches merged into schema.json by generate-schema.js. Use only for values the static parser cannot resolve (enum-derived choices and defaults, descriptions missing upstream, source-expression defaultText made human-readable). Keep entries minimal and verify against neonctl source when refreshing the schema pin.

help.describe: Show help for a command or subcommand

api-key.describe: Neon API key, authenticates without `neonctl auth`

context-file.describe: Context file with default org, project, and branch IDs, created by `neonctl link`
context-file.defaultText: nearest .neon file, searching upward from the current directory

env-pull.describe: Pull the branch's Neon env vars (DATABASE_URL, ...) into a local .env after checkout. On by default; use --no-env-pull to skip, for example when injecting env at runtime with `neon-env run` (from `@neondatabase/env`) or `neonctl dev`.

Pull the linked branch's Neon env vars (DATABASE_URL, ...) into a local .env after linking. On by default; use --no-env-pull to skip, for example when injecting env at runtime with `neon-env run` (from `@neondatabase/env`) or `neonctl dev`.

hipaa.describe: Enable HIPAA compliance for the project.
Enable HIPAA compliance for the project.

provider-id.describe: OAuth provider ID. Supported values: google, github, vercel
OAuth provider ID. Supported values: google, github, vercel
OAuth provider ID. Supported values: google, github, vercel

agent.describe: Agent to configure. Supported values: `cursor`, `copilot` (VS Code), `claude` (Claude Code).
